argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json,subprocess
p=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\resource_provider_integration_seam_preflight_v1.py")
r=subprocess.run([r"Z:/FOXAI/Runtime/Desktop/python/python.exe","-I","-B","-S",str(p),"self-test"],cwd=r"Z:\FOXAI",capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=45)
assert r.returncode==0,(r.stdout,r.stderr)
obj=json.loads(r.stdout); assert obj["status"]=="ok" and obj["output_count"]==3 and obj["supported_resource_category_count"]==18 and obj["routing_fixture_count"]==8 and obj["surface_count"]==2
assert obj["slash_bypass_before_any_provider"] is True and obj["protected_context_priority"] is True and obj["resource_after_protected_no_match"] is True and obj["ordinary_chat_preserved"] is True and obj["canonical_lf_only"] is True and obj["k_path_excluded"] is True
print(json.dumps(obj,sort_keys=True))

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-154330-42BAE0_V1B2B_RESOURCE_PROVIDER_INTEGRATION_SEAM_PREFLIGHT"); expected={"RESOURCE_PROVIDER_INTEGRATION_PREFLIGHT_RECEIPT.json": "2738abcb23646e99b9936cd3501721e2901d3cc8ba942cb302d6662ae1dff612", "RESOURCE_PROVIDER_INTEGRATION_SEAM_MAP.json": "e43691d671e4feea43c18fc94e97ca82468b2ca9d18d649554c0008bd82ad490", "RESOURCE_PROVIDER_ROUTING_PREFLIGHT_FIXTURES.json": "1dd58fe3d6dd5056e69340f372464d33af38140f9ca076b8cffbb280813c6690"}
for name,digest in expected.items():
 data=(out/name).read_bytes(); assert hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()==digest,(name,hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest())
seam=json.loads((out/"RESOURCE_PROVIDER_INTEGRATION_SEAM_MAP.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8")); assert seam["status"]=="preflight_mapped_and_verified" and seam["verified_input_count"]==18
shared=seam["smallest_safe_shared_seam"]; assert shared["module"]=="self_knowledge_chat_adapter_v1.py" and shared["callable"]=="route_message(message, surface, request_id=None, selectors=None)" and shared["integration_performed_in_this_mission"] is False and shared["live_source_patch_required_for_surface_entry_points"] is False
surfaces=seam["surface_seams"]; assert surfaces["webui"]["shared_adapter_callable"].startswith("route_message") and surfaces["desktop"]["shared_adapter_callable"].startswith("route_message")
assert surfaces["webui"]["current_helper_slash_guard"]=="raw_first_character_only" and surfaces["desktop"]["current_helper_explicit_slash_guard"] is False and seam["current_seam_observations"]["required_future_shared_guard"]=="first non-whitespace character"
compat=seam["callable_compatibility"]["answer_packet_compatibility"]; assert compat["existing_v1a3e_schema_preserved"] is True and compat["shared_answer_contract_modified"] is False
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B2B_SEAM_AND_CALLABLE_COMPATIBILITY_OK")
validations.name: Validate exact output hashes, shared seam, static call chains, callable compatibility, and answer-packet compatibility

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-154330-42BAE0_V1B2B_RESOURCE_PROVIDER_INTEGRATION_SEAM_PREFLIGHT"); routing=json.loads((out/"RESOURCE_PROVIDER_ROUTING_PREFLIGHT_FIXTURES.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8")); assert routing["status"]=="routing_preflight_passed"
fixtures=routing["fixture_results"]; assert fixtures["all_passed"] is True and fixtures["fixture_count"]==8 and fixtures["surface_case_count"]==16
rows={row["fixture_id"]:row for row in fixtures["fixtures"]}
for fid in ("FIXTURE-HISTORICAL-RAM","FIXTURE-DOMINANT-MEMORY"): assert all(x["route"]=="resource_evidence_provider" and x["status"]=="answered" and x["current_state_claimed"] is False and x["live_scan_performed"] is False for x in rows[fid]["surface_results"])
assert all(x["route"]=="ordinary_chat" and x["reason"]=="requires_current_live_state" and x["resource_evidence_loaded"] is False for x in rows["FIXTURE-CURRENT-LIVE"]["surface_results"])
assert all(x["route"]=="protected_context_self_knowledge" and x["status"]=="clarification_required" and x["resource_provider_invoked"] is False for x in rows["FIXTURE-WEBUI-LAUNCHER"]["surface_results"])
for fid in ("FIXTURE-JOKE","FIXTURE-CREATIVE-MEMORY"): assert all(x["route"]=="ordinary_chat" and x["resource_evidence_loaded"] is False for x in rows[fid]["surface_results"])
for fid in ("FIXTURE-SLASH-DIRECT","FIXTURE-SLASH-SPACED"): assert all(x["route"]=="slash_command_bypass" and x["protected_provider_invoked"] is False and x["resource_provider_invoked"] is False and x["protected_evidence_loaded"] is False and x["resource_evidence_loaded"] is False for x in rows[fid]["surface_results"])
overlap=routing["overlap_results"]; assert overlap["supported_category_count"]==18 and overlap["representative_direct_overlap_count"]==0 and overlap["engineered_ambiguous_phrase_count"]==4
assert all(row["deterministic_precedence"]=="protected_context_self_knowledge" and row["silent_ordinary_chat_theft"] is False for row in overlap["ambiguous_phrases"]); assert all(routing["routing_invariants"].values())
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B2B_ROUTING_FIXTURES_AND_OVERLAP_OK")
validations.name: Validate two-surface routing fixtures, all 18 resource categories, ambiguous overlap precedence, and ordinary chat
